where.if: AND ( c.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR c.COMPONENT_PROD_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID, c.COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, c.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME,
c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME,
c.SALE_TYPE_CD, sale_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_TYPE_NAME, c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD, storage_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, c.CUT_TYPE_CD, c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD, process_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, c.UNIT_TYPE_CD, unit_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS UNIT_TYPE_NAME,
c.LIST_PRICE, c.COST_PRICE, c.VAT_RATE, CAST(c.LIST_PRICE * c.VAT_RATE / 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS VAT_AMOUNT,
c.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, c.SALE_STATUS_CD, sale_status.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_STATUS_NAME, c.SALE_START_DT, c.SALE_END_DT,
c.TOTAL_SALE_QTY, c.USE_YN, c.DEL_YN,
c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.MOD_ID, c.MOD_DT FROM TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE sale_type ON sale_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_type.CODE_ID = 'SALE_TYPE' AND sale_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.SALE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE sale_status ON sale_status.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_status.CODE_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_status.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.SALE_STATUS_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE storage_type ON storage_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND storage_type.CODE_ID = 'STORAGE_TYPE' AND storage_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE process_type ON process_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND process_type.CODE_ID = 'PROCESS_TYPE' AND process_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE unit_type ON unit_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND unit_type.CODE_ID = 'UNIT_TYPE' AND unit_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.UNIT_TYPE_CD
ORDER BY c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID DESC
LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID, c.COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, c.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME,
c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME,
c.SALE_TYPE_CD, sale_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_TYPE_NAME, c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD, storage_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, c.CUT_TYPE_CD, c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD, process_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, c.UNIT_TYPE_CD, unit_type.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS UNIT_TYPE_NAME,
c.LIST_PRICE, c.COST_PRICE, c.VAT_RATE, CAST(c.LIST_PRICE * c.VAT_RATE / 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS VAT_AMOUNT,
c.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, c.SALE_STATUS_CD, sale_status.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_STATUS_NAME, c.SALE_START_DT, c.SALE_END_DT,
c.TOTAL_SALE_QTY, c.USE_YN, c.DEL_YN,
c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.MOD_ID, c.MOD_DT FROM TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE sale_type ON sale_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_type.CODE_ID = 'SALE_TYPE' AND sale_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.SALE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE sale_status ON sale_status.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_status.CODE_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND sale_status.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.SALE_STATUS_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE storage_type ON storage_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND storage_type.CODE_ID = 'STORAGE_TYPE' AND storage_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE process_type ON process_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND process_type.CODE_ID = 'PROCESS_TYPE' AND process_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE unit_type ON unit_type.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND unit_type.CODE_ID = 'UNIT_TYPE' AND unit_type.DETAIL_CODE_ID = c.UNIT_TYPE_CD WHERE c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT ( COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, COMPONENT_PROD_NAME, SELLER_MEMBER_ID,
SALE_TYPE_CD, STORAGE_TYPE_CD, CUT_TYPE_CD, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, UNIT_TYPE_CD,
LIST_PRICE, COST_PRICE, VAT_RATE,
EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, SALE_STATUS_CD, SALE_START_DT, SALE_END_DT,
TOTAL_SALE_QTY, USE_YN, DEL_YN,
REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{componentProdCode}, #{componentProdName}, #{sellerMemberId},
#{saleTypeCd}, #{storageTypeCd}, #{cutTypeCd}, #{processTypeCd}, #{unitTypeCd},
#{listPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{vatRate},
#{exposureStatusCd}, #{saleStatusCd}, #{saleStartDt}, #{saleEndDt},
#{totalSaleQty}, #{useYn}, 'N',
#{regId}, NOW(), #{modId}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT SET COMPONENT_PROD_CODE = #{componentProdCode}, COMPONENT_PROD_NAME = #{componentProdName}, SELLER_MEMBER_ID = #{sellerMemberId},
SALE_TYPE_CD = #{saleTypeCd}, STORAGE_TYPE_CD = #{storageTypeCd}, CUT_TYPE_CD = #{cutTypeCd}, PROCESS_TYPE_CD = #{processTypeCd}, UNIT_TYPE_CD = #{unitTypeCd},
LIST_PRICE = #{listPrice}, COST_PRICE = #{costPrice}, VAT_RATE = #{vatRate},
EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD = #{exposureStatusCd}, SALE_STATUS_CD = #{saleStatusCd}, SALE_START_DT = #{saleStartDt}, SALE_END_DT = #{saleEndDt},
TOTAL_SALE_QTY = #{totalSaleQty}, USE_YN = #{useYn},
MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE COMPONENT_PROD_ID = #{componentProdId}
UPDATE TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE COMPONENT_PROD_ID = #{value}
